hero.tagline: Contributing to Shopify apps serving 5,500+ merchants at BSS Commerce.

about.title: About
about.bio: I'm Trưởng — a full-stack developer with nearly 2 years of experience across Shopify app development, internal tooling, and microservices-based systems. Currently building apps serving 5,500+ merchants at BSS Commerce with 1,550+ five-star reviews.
about.bio2: Specialized in React, Remix, TypeScript, and Node.js with deep familiarity in the Shopify ecosystem. Growing toward a software architect role.

experience.title: Experience
experience.bss_desc1: Develop and maintain 2 production Shopify apps serving 5,500+ merchants with 1,550+ five-star reviews.
experience.bss_desc2: Build end-to-end features: column width customization, translation import/export, live preview, conditional logic.
experience.bss_desc3: Technical support and custom integration for 50+ enterprise merchants.
experience.vcc_desc1: Built UI features using Vue.js and PrimeVue in real production projects.
experience.dra_desc1: Built full-stack features with SvelteKit and Node.js microservices.
experience.dra_desc2: Integrated Apache Kafka for event-driven messaging between services.

projects.title: Projects
projects.optis_desc: Advanced variant management system with unlimited options, custom fields, and conditional logic.
projects.swatch_desc: Variant visualization system using color swatches — fully overrides Shopify's default selectors.
